case_title: ST. JOHN VICTORIA M. VS WALTER GRAY JR.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ST. JOHN VICTORIA M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALTER GRAY JR. $510.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $539.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE WAS INADVERTENTLY SCHEDULED TO JUDGE CHOPPELAS, SHOULD HAVE BEEN ASSIGNED TO JUDGE COLBERT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALTER GRAY JR.
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT WALTER GRAY JR. HEARING SET FOR APR-12-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WALTER GRAY JR.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT OF APR-12-1993, GRANTED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WALTER GRAY JR.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $236.10 AS TO DEFENDANT WALTER GRAY JR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $510.00 FILED BY ST. JOHN VICTORIA M. AS TO DEFENDANT WALTER GRAY JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALTER GRAY JR.
